inputs.label: Your brand name
inputs.description: The brand or product name for your social presence

inputs.label: Your social media profiles
inputs.description: Your social media profile URLs, one per line

inputs.label: Competitor social profiles
inputs.description: Competitor social media profile URLs to monitor, one per line

inputs.label: Content topics
inputs.description: Topics you want to post about, one per line
inputs.placeholder:
AI automation tips
Product updates
Industry trends
Behind the scenes

inputs.label: Brand voice
inputs.description: The tone of voice for your social content

inputs.label: Platforms to focus on
inputs.description: Which social platforms to create content for, one per line

daily-content.description: Scan trending topics and generate platform-specific post drafts for approval

activities.intent: Scan trending topics on X, LinkedIn, and Reddit relevant to the brand's content topics
steps: Open X/Twitter trending topics and search for content_topics via browser
Check LinkedIn feed for trending posts in the brand's industry
Scan relevant Reddit communities for hot discussions
Identify 3-5 trending angles that align with the brand's topics

activities.intent: Create 2-3 post drafts tailored to each target platform using brand voice
steps: For each trending angle, draft 2-3 posts adapted to the target platforms
Match the brand_voice setting for tone and style
Include hooks, calls to action, and hashtags appropriate to each platform
Add suggested posting times based on typical engagement windows

activities.intent: Present drafts to user with recommendations and queue approved posts
steps: Present all drafts grouped by platform with a clear recommendation for each
Explain why each draft should perform well based on current trends
Wait for user approval or edits before queuing

mention-monitor.description: Search for brand mentions, categorize them, and draft responses for complaints and questions

activities.intent: Quick scan of social platforms for brand mentions and categorize them
steps: Search X/Twitter for brand_name mentions and related keywords via browser
Search LinkedIn for brand mentions and tags
Categorize each mention: praise, complaint, question, or neutral mention
Compare against previous check in memory to identify new mentions only

activities.intent: Draft responses for complaints and questions, alert on significant mentions
steps: For complaints and questions, draft on-brand responses matching brand_voice
Flag any mentions from high-follower accounts or potential PR issues
Only alert the user if there are actionable mentions — skip routine noise
Present responses for approval — never auto-reply

weekly-digest.description: Compile weekly social performance report with engagement analysis and content recommendations

activities.intent: Compile engagement, reach, and follower growth data from all platforms
steps: Check each social profile for this week's performance metrics via browser
Record engagement rate, impressions, follower count changes, and top posts
Compare against previous week's data stored in memory

activities.intent: Identify top and bottom performing posts and recommend content themes for next week
steps: Rank posts by engagement rate, not just impressions
Identify patterns: what topics, formats, and posting times drove the most replies and shares
Identify underperforming content and explain why it likely fell flat
Recommend 3-5 content themes for the coming week based on what worked
Store the digest in memory for trend tracking
Present the report to the user

competitor-watch.description: Monitor competitor social profiles for notable activity — viral posts, new campaigns, or messaging changes

activities.intent: Check competitor social profiles for new posts and high-engagement content
steps: Visit each competitor social profile listed in competitors_social via browser
Identify new posts since the last check
Note any posts with unusually high engagement (viral content, new campaigns)
Detect messaging changes, new product announcements, or positioning shifts
Only alert the user if something notable happened — skip routine posts
Store findings in memory for weekly trend analysis

content-repurpose.description: Take a blog post, article, or video URL and create platform-specific social content from it

activities.intent: Read and extract the key points from the provided URL
steps: Open the provided URL via browser and extract the full content
Identify the main thesis, key takeaways, quotable moments, and data points
Note the original format (blog post, article, video transcript) for adaptation

activities.intent: Create platform-specific versions adapted for tone, format, and audience
steps: Create an X/Twitter thread: hook tweet + 3-5 follow-up tweets with key insights
Create a LinkedIn post: professional tone, storytelling format, clear takeaway
Create an Instagram caption: conversational, emoji-friendly, with relevant hashtags
Adapt tone and format per platform while keeping the core message consistent
Present all versions side by side for user review and approval
